extension.description: Trakt Player v2.0.0 - Superpowered Trakt addon. Click any movie or episode and it plays instantly via Debrid. Features: Click-and-Play (auto 1080p), Trakt Scrobbling, Up Next (auto-play next episode), Continue Watching, Personalized Recommendations, My Calendar, Watch History, Popular Community Lists, Anticipated Content, Related/More Like This, Rate on Trakt, Debrid Account Status with renewal info. Supports Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, and TorBox. 5 torrent scrapers. Native urllib for Kodi 21+.
extension.news: [2.0.0] Complete rewrite. Torrent-only click-and-play. Scrobbling, Up Next, Continue Watching, Recommendations, Calendar, History, Popular Lists, Anticipated, Related Content, Ratings, Account Status, Donation tab. All debrid providers. Native urllib. No search dialogs.
